feedback.text: I would spend on the Digital Fairness Act to be adapted to include video games. The video game industry has grown much in the last decade and has become a very important part of our daily lives. But many companies take advantage of the lax regulation in this sector to encourage anti-consumer policies, such as denying access to a digital product for which the user has already paid or introducing elements that are dangerously similar to games of chance in video games targeting minors.
